records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Authenticated (<?/); p. pr. & vb. n. Authenticating (<?/).]

defs: To render authentic; to give authority to, by the proof, attestation, or formalities required by law, or sufficient to entitle to credit.
quotes: The king serves only as a notary to authenticate the choice of judges.

defs: To prove authentic; to determine as real and true; as, to authenticate a portrait.
